url_substitutions.new_value: Inputs/Capitalism Data/Technical/data/raw/01_SOURCE_MATERIALS/Web Folders/Shaikh Publications/[2020] Shaikh - An Empirically Sufficient Form for Sraffa Prices.pdf

url_substitutions.field: open_questions reference to Brooks Notre Dame Gini-method URL

data_substitutions.concept: ES2306 (optional v1.1) US/China relative manufacturing unit labor cost
applies_to_series: ES2306 (deferred to v1.1 per decision 0006 recommendation)
data_substitutions.discontinued_source: BLS International Labor Comparisons Table 9 (manufacturing ULC, terminated 2013) underlying Golub et al. (2018) 7.8:1 headline ratio

canonical_substitute_hifi.source: The Conference Board International Labor Comparisons
canonical_substitute_hifi.concept_match_justification: Inherits Ch11 wave2 canonical resolution; Conference Board ILC is explicit BLS ILC successor with documented method-continuity report. Preferred for high-fidelity replication when licensed access available.

canonical_substitute_open.concept_match_justification: Inherits Ch11 wave2 canonical resolution; whole-economy (ISIC A-T) vs Shaikh / Golub manufacturing-only -- partial sectoral concept gap; flagged as `proxy: true` with sectoral-narrowing note.

data_substitutions.concept: ES2301-D / ES2301-E (if split) literature compilations of RMB misalignment estimates
data_substitutions.non_extensibility_rationale: These are intrinsically literature-compilation series per paper note 17: 'If a source reported more than one estimate of the RMB misalignment, each estimate was treated as a separate data point in the scatter plots. If the estimate of the RMB misalignment is reported as a range, the maximum and minimum value are reported in the scatter plots as two separate estimates.' The 4 cited literature reviews (Cline-Williamson 2007 PIIE, Dunaway-Li 2005 IMF WP, Cheung-Chinn-Fujii 2010a, Cheung 2012) were one-off academic surveys; IMF External Sector Reports from 2015+ are CONCEPT-ADJACENT but methodologically distinct (different inclusion criteria, different equilibrium-RER models). Flag as `extension_status: not_applicable_literature_compilation` -- not a data-unavailable blocker, an intrinsic methodological boundary.

if_approved_main_thread_actions: 1. Update Technical/docs/decisions/0006_es2301_decomposition_pending.md to status='APPROVED' with this recommendation rationale
2. Run Technical/code/utils/_phase3b_registry_expansion.py (or equivalent) to add 4 new ES placeholder rows: ES2302, ES2303, ES2304, ES2305
3. Rescope existing ES2301 row from composite parent to Fig-1 component only (US-China bilateral trade balance, Census FT900)
5. Dispatch 1 Phase 3 catchup subagent to fill ES2302/ES2303/ES2304/ES2305 dossiers (~2 hours estimated)
6. Dispatch 1 Phase 4 catchup subagent to write CHES_ADEQUACY_REPORT_V2.json covering the 4 new series (~1 hour estimated)
7. Record ES2306 in v1.1 backlog with Ch11 wave2 BLS ILC substitution inheritance note
if_rejected_main_thread_actions: 1. Update Technical/docs/decisions/0006_es2301_decomposition_pending.md to status='CLOSED' with rationale='deferred to v1.1'
2. ES2301 ships as single composite for v1.0; 5-way breakdown documented in ES2301_paper_summary.md and this adequacy report's decision_0006_recommendation block
3. v1.1 scope inherits ES2302-ES2306 backlog (5 series including optional ES2306)

Weber & Shaikh (2020) Fig 4 -- RMB misalignment estimates under extended PPP approach (scatter compilation)

primary_source.publication: Compilation from 4 literature reviews: Cline-Williamson (2007 PIIE), Dunaway-Li (2005 IMF WP), Cheung-Chinn-Fujii (2010a), Cheung (2012)
primary_source.units: percent RMB misalignment vs equilibrium under extended-PPP model
primary_source.license: literature-derivative; handled by re-extraction per paper note 17 compilation rule, NOT republication

primary_source.agency: Author literature compilation (same 4 literature reviews as ES2304)

v1_1_deferred_series_metadata.name: Weber & Shaikh (2020) body-text claim -- US/China relative manufacturing unit labor cost (7.8:1 over 2000-2010)
v1_1_deferred_series_metadata.primary_source_original: Golub et al. (2018) The World Economy, underlying BLS International Labor Comparisons Table 9 (manufacturing ULC, terminated 2013)
v1_1_deferred_series_metadata.rationale_for_v1_1_deferral: Not figured in paper; substitution complexity already canonicalized in Ch11 wave2; year-by-year time-series construction introduces methodological choices Weber-Shaikh did not explicitly make (their 7.8:1 is a 2000-2010 average citation, not a TS); v1.1 inclusion preserves analytical value with cleaner Ch11-canonical sourcing.

ES2301.primary: Census FT900 API or USA Trade Online
